fields.description: The action, in plain language (e.g. "Approve the bill").
fields.label: Step / Action

fields.description: Who performs the step — role and/or person (e.g. "Accounts User (Jane)").
fields.label: Responsible (R)

fields.description: Who owns the outcome / final sign-off — ideally one person.
fields.label: Accountable (A)

fields.description: Whose input is sought before the step (no edit authority).
fields.label: Consulted (C)

fields.description: Who is kept in the loop after the step (notify only).
fields.label: Informed (I)

fields.description: Where the step happens. Blank for purely manual / process-only steps.
fields.label: ERPNext DocType

fields.options:

fields.description: How "who does it" is enforced in ERPNext (see program plan §3).
fields.label: Enforcement

fields.description: Current state: already enforced, just needs config, a gap to build, or process-only.
fields.label: Coverage
fields.options:
Built / Existing
Config Needed
Gap — To Build
Manual / Process-Only

fields.description: The file / record the enforcement lands in (e.g. fixtures/workflow.json, a role patch, hooks.py).
fields.label: Config Target
